home.heroSubtitle: Community-driven roadmaps, guides, and resources to help you pick your path and grow in your career as a developer.
home.sectionDescription: Explore curated roadmaps grouped by role-based and skill-based learning tracks
home.noRoleMatch: No role-based roadmaps match your search.
home.noSkillMatch: No skill-based roadmaps match your search.
home.statsDescription: Built by the community, for the community

roadmap.notFoundText: The roadmap you're looking for doesn't exist.
roadmap.confirmResetProgress: Reset all saved progress for this roadmap?
roadmap.graphHint: Click topic for details • Scroll to zoom • Drag to pan

detail.completedToggle: Completed (click to mark as not completed)
detail.progressSynced: Progress is synced to your account.
detail.progressBrowserOnly: Progress is saved only in this browser (guest mode).
detail.signInHint: Sign in to save your learning progress.
detail.noContent: No detailed content available for this topic yet.

favorites.title: Your Favorite Roadmaps
favorites.subtitleAccount: Roadmaps you starred are synced to your account and available across browsers.
favorites.subtitleBrowser: Roadmaps you starred are saved only in this browser (guest mode).
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart icon on any roadmap from the home page to save it here.

inProgress.title: In Progress Roadmaps
inProgress.subtitleAccount: Roadmaps where your completion is between 1% and 99%, synced to your account across browsers.
inProgress.subtitleBrowser: Roadmaps where your completion is between 1% and 99%, saved only in this browser (guest mode).
inProgress.emptyDescription: Open a roadmap and mark some steps completed to see it appear here.

qa.title: Find Your Best Roadmap Match
qa.subtitle: Answer each question step-by-step. Then Gemini will recommend the top roadmaps for your profile.
qa.scopeAccount: Recommendations are saved to your account and available across devices.
qa.scopeBrowser: Recommendations are saved in this browser only (guest mode).
qa.introDescription: The wizard asks one question at a time with no skipping, then returns your top matching roadmaps.
qa.resultSubtitle: Top 1-3 include detailed reasons. Top 4-10 are additional matches.

authLogin.title: Welcome Back
authLogin.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
